title: Two Sum
statement: Given an array and target, return indices of two numbers that add to target.

title: Contains Duplicate
statement: Check if array contains duplicate values.

title: Valid Anagram
statement: Check if two strings are anagrams.
solution_code:
def is_anagram(s, t):
    return sorted(s) == sorted(t)

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
statement: Find max profit from single transaction.
solution_code:
def max_profit(prices):
    min_price = float('inf')
    max_profit = 0
    for price in prices:
        min_price = min(min_price, price)
        max_profit = max(max_profit, price - min_price)
    return max_profit

title: Product of Array Except Self
statement: Return product of all elements except self.
solution_code:
def product_except_self(nums):
    n = len(nums)
    result = [1] * n
    prefix = 1
    for i in range(n):
        result[i] = prefix
        prefix *= nums[i]
    postfix = 1
    for i in range(n - 1, -1, -1):
        result[i] *= postfix
        postfix *= nums[i]
    return result
